title: Summit Push
editorialSummary: Mountain climbing terminology grouped by the phase of a climb it belongs to. Acclimatization phase: terms for adjusting to altitude before the summit push. Technical ascent: gear and technique used while moving up steep terrain. High-camp life: shelter and logistics at the high camps. Hazards: objective dangers the climber must manage. All terms are standard alpinism vocabulary with no cross-group ambiguity.
